name: Volume Cap Exception for 501(c)(3) and Specific Facilities

eligibility.description: Applies to qualified 501(c)(3) bonds and specific exempt facility bonds under 142(a) such as airports, docks, and certain high-speed intercity rail facilities.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Exempts qualified 501(c)(3) bonds and certain exempt facility bonds (like airports, docks, and high-speed rail) from the restrictive State volume caps.
